stemHtml: A manufacturer shortens the fuselage of a 9 seat plane to a 6 seat plane. They make the vertical fin and horizontal stabiliser bigger. What is the effect of increasing the surface of the vertical fin?

options.a: Pitch up, due to more drag of the higher fin creating a pitch up moment.
options.b: Lateral stability increases because of the height of the fin increses.
options.c: Decrease directional stability due to the decrease rudder force effectiveness.
options.d: Decreasing longitudinal stability because of the shorter fuselage.
